source_policy.rule: src/api.py declares schema(); artifacts/README.md documents the same contract; tests and validator consume that declared contract.
source_policy.runtime_data_model_rule: The generated schema/README must declare endpoint args and data shapes; tests must use those declared shapes.

constraints: Use Python standard library unless dependencies are declared later.
Generated files must stay inside the task workspace.
Tests must be non-interactive and deterministic.

work_order.notes: Implementation notes for this API-first work order. Source of truth: task blackboard contract plus artifacts/README.md. Coder declares the task-specific schema/data model; README documents it; validator and tests consume that same contract.
success_criteria: test suite exercises public API endpoints and JSON responses
